subject: address known Zookeeper bugs
commit_message:
address known Zookeeper bugs

fix the issues while deleting unwanted data in zookeeper image
fix the issues while adding ACL's to the Kafka znodes

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1413
Change-Id: I6215593c99187cd786df72309cd1bd28983061ee
Signed-off-by: su622b <su622b@att.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

@krzysztof, yes support of https has been added on testsuite/robot side for https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/103779. So in the meantime we cannot rely on healthcheck.
Same for CLI (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/104338).

And yes that's a pity testsuite has its own repo, it only adds complexity and no value add (same for AAI).
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
